title: Simple Radio Re-Created
description: Redesigns the Simple Radio mod in the style of the Create mod.
body:
[![Stand With Ukraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine/)

# Overview
**Simple Radio Re-Created** redesigns the [Simple Radio mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-radio) in the style of the Create mod.
I recommend to use it together with [Farcr's Re-Create](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farcrs-re-create).

Currently, the reworks include:
- Transceiver
- Radio
- Radiosmither

## Credits
The resourcepack uses a color palette from [Farcr's Re-Create](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farcrs-re-create).
